name: French Silk Pie Bars
instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C). Lightly grease a 9x9-inch baking pan. 2. For crust: Combine 1/melted butter and 1/white sugar in a bowl. Add finely crushed graham crackers; mix well. Press mixture into the bottom of the prepared pan. 3. Bake in preheated oven until crust is set, about 8 minutes. Cool completely on a wire rack. 4. For filling: Melt the bittersweet chocolate over simmering water and set aside. 5. Whisk 2 eggs, 3/white sugar, 1/brown sugar, water, and 1/salt over simmering water until sugar dissolves and mixture reaches 165 degrees F. Remove from heat. 6. Beat egg mixture on high until light and cooled. Add melted chocolate and vanilla extract; beat on low. 7. Gradually beat in unsalted butter, pieces at a time, until incorporated. Fold in whipped heavy cream until combined. Spread mixture over cooled crust and chill until nearly set. 8. For topping: Beat the cream cheese with the white sugar, vanilla extract, and a pinch of salt until smooth. 9. Gradually beat in heavy cream until stiff peaks form. Spread over chocolate filling. 10. Chill at least 4 hours before serving topped with the chocolate curls or sprinkles.
simpleInstructions: 1. Preheat oven and prepare baking pan. 2. Make crust, press into pan, bake, then cool. 3. Melt the chocolate and set aside. 4. Whisk the eggs and sugars over simmering water. Beat until cooled and light. 5. Mix in chocolate, vanilla, and butter into egg mixture. Fold in whipped cream. Spread over crust and chill. 6. Make topping with the cream cheese, sugar, vanilla, and cream. Beat until peaks form and spread over filling. 7. Chill before serving.
